texto: I jumped at the sound of Drake's voice. "You scared the crap out of me! Where did you come from?"He raised his eyebrows, "From what I learned in Anatomy, I came from my Mother. But if you are refering to just now, through the door.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de K.A. Robinson que provoca temas ligados a amor. Ao questionar “I jumped at the sound of Drake's voice. "You scared the crap out of me! Where did you come from?"…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, college-romance, contemporary-romance, com foco em contemporary-romance.
